design_philosophy: Premium, cinematic, dark portfolio website for 'Jay Alminshawi'. Emphasizes deep blacks, thin precise borders, immersive 3D-feeling mockups, and bold cinematic typography for a Webflow-agency aesthetic.

scale.h1_hero: text-6xl sm:text-7xl lg:text-[8vw] uppercase font-bold tracking-tighter leading-none

layout.spacing: Generous spacing. Use py-24 or py-32 for section padding. Gap-8 to gap-12 in grids.
layout.borders: Use border-border/40 for a sharp, technical agency feel.

components.navbar: Fixed z-50, w-full, backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/40 border-b border-white/5. 'BUILD YOUR WEBSITE' pill CTA and Hamburger.
components.hero: Cinematic. Giant title using display font. 3D angled laptop mockup on the right with dark website inside, floating with shadow-2xl. 'SCROLL DOWN TO EXPLORE' indicator. Add a metallic shine sweep animation to the laptop.
components.buttons: Pill-shaped (rounded-full), 1px solid border-white/20, text-white. On hover: bg-white text-black with a subtle glow. Use magnetic hover physics if possible.
components.project_cards: Dark grey cards, thin border. Image inside a laptop mockup frame. Category label top, title bottom-left, circular arrow top-right. Hover: lift (-translate-y-2), subtle 3D tilt, and white glow shadow.
components.service_cards: Minimalist. Dark gradient background, line icon, thin border, corner arrow. Staggered reveal. Hover: white border glow.
components.testimonials: Glassmorphism panels (bg-white/5, backdrop-blur-xl, border-white/10). 3 cards fading from left. Include a decorative parallax laptop on the right side of the section.
components.about_philosophy: Bold inline typography ('CREATION', 'PERSONAL BRAND', etc. highlighted in white, rest muted). Horizontal mini project preview strip on the right.
components.footer: Massive oversized text ('JAY ALMINSHAWI') at text-[10vw], clean minimalist links, copyright 2026.
components.contact_form: Dark inputs, border-b only or thin 1px rounded-lg borders. Must handle backend storage.

animations.global: Lenis for smooth scroll (or framer-motion useScroll).
animations.parallax: Subtle y-axis translate on scroll for laptop mockups using useTransform.
animations.micro: Magnetic buttons, hover line-draw on icons, metallic sweep on hero.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use framer-motion extensively. Apply staggered card reveals for the Projects and Services sections.
Implement the 3D angled laptop mockups using CSS transforms (`rotateX`, `rotateY`, `perspective`) and framer-motion to create parallax and hover tilt effects.
For the 'Trusted By' logo strip, use sleek white/grey text typography (e.g., uppercase, wide tracking, opacity-50) instead of actual image logos to maintain the minimal aesthetic.
The Contact form must work, storing data. Tie the 'BUILD YOUR WEBSITE' navbar CTA to scroll to this contact section.
Ensure the hero mockup feels immersive with soft shadows/reflections and a metallic shine sweep (`animate={{ backgroundPosition: ['200% 0', '-200% 0'] }}`).
Follow the `.js` file rule strictly. Do NOT generate `.tsx` files.
All interactive elements MUST have `data-testid` properties (e.g., `data-testid="contact-submit-button"`, `data-testid="nav-build-website"`).
Avoid generic 'card' looks by using dark gradient backgrounds and thin 1px white/10 borders to blend cleanly with the dark #050505 background.
In the About section, ensure bold keywords are styled explicitly to pop against the muted paragraph text.
